basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Kalyani Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Kalyani
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Kalyani has invited applications for the post of Project Technical Support II on a purely temporary basis under the Department of Health Research (DHR) - Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) funded Young Faculty PhD Program. The project focuses on genetic mutations in patients with Non-Ischemic Dilated Cardiomyopathy. Eligible candidates can apply through the Google Form. The position is initially for 1 year (extendable). Find complete details below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be announced on AIIMS Kalyani website

age_limit.age_details: Department of Health Research (DHR) - Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR)

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: | 10+2 in Science + Bachelor’s Degree / Diploma in Biological Sciences (Cell Biology & Molecular Biology, Genetics, Zoology, Microbiology, Physiology) / Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT). | Desirable: | Minimum 2 years of experience from a Government / Autonomous / PSU or recognized organisation. Conversant with computer applications and knowledge of MS Excel and MS Word. Conversant in Bengali and Hindi. | Nature of Work: | Collection of blood samples from patients. Processing and transport of blood samples. Data collection and entry. Maintaining register of patients. Contacting patients for follow-up. Any other related work assigned by the PI.

how_to_apply: Fill the online Google Application Form available at the link provided in the official advertisement.
Upload all scanned documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, etc.).
Submit the form before the deadline.
Shortlisted candidates will be informed and called for an offline interview at AIIMS Kalyani.
No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates will be on the direct payroll of AIIMS Kalyani under the DHR-ICMR scheme. No claim for regular/permanent appointment. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Incomplete applications will be rejected. The decision of the Selection Committee is final. All disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of courts at Kolkata.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: AIIMS Kalyani has announced recruitment for Project Technical Support II under the project titled “PREVALENCE OF GENETIC MUTATIONS INVOLVING SARCOMERIC PROTEINS IN PATIENTS WITH NON-ISCHEMIC DILATED CARDIOMYOPATHY” led by Principal Investigator Dr. Deepanjan Bhattacharya, Assistant Professor, Department of Cardiology. Download AIIMS Kalyani Project Technical Support Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Kalyani Project Technical Support Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: 10+2 in Science + Bachelor’s Degree / Diploma in Biological Sciences (Cell Biology & Molecular Biology, Genetics, Zoology, Microbiology, Physiology) / Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT). Desirable: Minimum 2 years of experience from a Government / Autonomous / PSU or recognized organisation. Conversant with computer applications and knowledge of MS Excel and MS Word. Conversant in Bengali and Hindi. Nature of Work: Collection of blood samples from patients. Processing and transport of blood samples. Data collection and entry. Maintaining register of patients. Contacting patients for follow-up. Any other related work assigned by the PI.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AIIMS Kalyani Project Technical Support 2026
Important Instructions & Terms & Conditions
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates will be on the direct payroll of AIIMS Kalyani under the DHR-ICMR scheme. No claim for regular/permanent appointment. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. Incomplete applications will be rejected. The decision of the Selection Committee is final. All disputes will be subject to the jurisdiction of courts at Kolkata.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Kalyani Project Technical Support II 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit the application within 15 days from the date of advertisement (up to 5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical Support at AIIMS Kalyani?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy under the DHR-ICMR Young Faculty PhD Program.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Technical Support II at AIIMS Kalyani?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will receive Rs. 20,000/- + 30% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for AIIMS Kalyani ICMR Project Position?
faq.answer: Maximum age should be 30 years or less as on the last date of application.

faq.question: Q5. What is the essential qualification required for Project Technical Support II?
faq.answer: 10+2 in Science + Bachelor’s/Diploma in Biological Sciences or Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT/MLT).

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for AIIMS Kalyani DHR ICMR Project Technical Support?
faq.answer: Fill and submit the online Google Form with all required documents uploaded.

faq.question: Q7. Is the appointment permanent at AIIMS Kalyani?
faq.answer: No, the appointment is purely temporary for 1 year (extendable).

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title at AIIMS Kalyani for this recruitment?
faq.answer: “Prevalence of Genetic Mutations Involving Sarcomeric Proteins in Patients with Non-Ischemic Dilated Cardiomyopathy”.

faq.question: Q9. Will interview be conducted offline for AIIMS Kalyani Project Staff?
faq.answer: Yes, the interview will be conducted offline only at AIIMS Kalyani. No TA/DA is admissible.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the Google Form link for AIIMS Kalyani Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The link is provided in the official advertisement on the AIIMS Kalyani website.
